arts.ttl: Man United wonderkid 'wanted by Barcelona' as Catalan giants 'look to take advantage' of English club's financial concerns
arts.sum: Barcelona are allegedly interested in signing Manchester United attacker Alejandro Garnacho during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Everton, Fulham and Bournemouth vying for rival Premier League club's captain
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Everton, Fulham and Bournemouth are ready to make approaches for a rival Premier League club’s captain. Everton have turned...

arts.ttl: Burnley stars snubbed handshake after former Man United star faced alleged racism abuse
arts.sum: Hannibal Mejbri was allegedly racially abused by Milutin Osmajic a fortnight ago and Burnley's players showed their support for the midfielder by refusing to shake his hand

arts.ttl: FA Cup: Man Utd to face matured Fulham in FA Cup repeat
arts.sum: But while Newcastle have failed to demonstrate their own considerable threat at Man City and Liverpool this month, they showed their own attacking thrust at home against Nottingham Forest last weekend in a 4-3 thriller and their place in the Carabao Cup final, courtesy of two wins over Arsenal in the semis, underlines their appetite to end their silverware wait this term. Newcastle and Brighton - semi-finalists in the FA Cup in 2019 and 2023 - are now major players in this field reduced of Premier League heavyweights.

arts.ttl: Man United 'identify Europa League specialist' as potential Ruben Amorim replacement
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly view Aston Villa manager Unai Emery as a potential replacement for current head coach Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho moment showed why Man Utd will cash in despite talent
arts.sum: As they try to raise funds for new blood, the Argentine attacker will be one of those the Old Trafford executives might well listen to offers for when the summer transfer window opens

arts.ttl: Man United loanee Marcus Rashford sends Aston Villa teammate message after David De Gea gesture
arts.sum: The Man United loanee was in action for Aston Villa in their FA Cup win over Cardiff City on Friday night

arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester United vs. Fulham injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's FA Cup clash between Manchester United and Fulham.

arts.ttl: Fulham man on ‘big brother’, ‘very good relationship’ with Wolves star and what he misses from home
arts.sum: Fulham striker Rodrigo Muniz has heaped praise on teammate Andreas Pereira, admitting he is like his big brother at Craven Cottage. Muniz has been speaking to GE Globo about life at Fulham and his relationship with various Brazilian players in the Premier League. arts.ttl: IFAB approve new rule change that will affect Manchester United and Man City
arts.sum: Manchester United and Manchester City will both be affected by a new law which will be introduced next season
